title: FMD - Both earbuds connected
scenario: Find My Device map shows Osprey and Tern devices as single entities when accessed via Lens app settings
steps: 1. Ensure both earbuds are connected to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Open the Lens app with an Osprey device connected.
3. Tap the App Settings (hamburger) icon in the top-left or top-right corner.
4. Select "Find My Device" from the settings menu.
5. Observe the device shown on the map.
expected: The Osprey device is recognized on the map as a single device. Similarly, a Tern device should also be recognized on the map as one device.
